scope.description: Repository-wide evidence inventory for the 34 atomic-module manifests. Classifies every contract name referenced in the manifest bundle, process step catalog, UI catalog, communication channels, and services source, using authoritative registries in EAFIX_auth_docs/01_canonical_registries plus contracts/events, contracts/models, tests, and services.
scope.output_authority: This inventory does NOT modify manifests, schemas, or code. It only reports evidence.

status_taxonomy.already_schema_defined: A JSON Schema exists under contracts/events for this contract
status_taxonomy.model_defined_no_schema: A Pydantic model exists under contracts/models but no JSON schema in contracts/events
status_taxonomy.ui_catalog_defined: Contract is declared authoritatively in ui_catalog.json (screens/APIs/websockets/data_contracts)
status_taxonomy.test_defined_only: Contract appears only in test fixtures/tests
status_taxonomy.source_defined_only: Contract is defined only in service source code (adapter/service inline models)
status_taxonomy.underivable: Contract is referenced but no authoritative fields exist anywhere
status_taxonomy.placeholder_error: Not a real contract; a narrative token was mistakenly promoted to contract_type

manifest_occurrences.note: Not directly listed under this name in bundle output_contracts; MarketTick used instead

source_code_evidence.note: Referenced as data_contract PriceTick_v1 in communication channels

test_evidence.note: Draft202012Validator validates schemas in contracts/schemas/json/ (not contracts/events/); CI validates contracts/events/*.json separately via jsonschema.Draft7Validator.check_schema in .github/workflows/1299900007260118_ci.yml:223-242

process_evidence.note: S07 emits MarketTick which is transport realization of PriceTick from D1

contract_inventory.recommendation: Use canonical schema PriceTick@1.0 as source of truth; treat MarketTick in bundle as alias/rename per step catalog.

manifest_occurrences.note: produced by R2_ORDER_INTENT_COMPILER (module 14), consumed by O1_ORDER_ROUTER (module 15)

model_evidence.note: class OrderIntent uses OrderSide enum values LONG/SHORT (line 75-78)

source_code_evidence.note: OrderIntent_v1_2 referenced in trading command channel

conflicts.description: OrderIntent JSON schema uses BUY/SELL while Pydantic OrderIntent model uses OrderSide=LONG/SHORT

contract_inventory.recommendation: Resolve BUY/SELL vs LONG/SHORT before schema_ref is written to manifests. JSON schema is authoritative per source_priority order.

manifest_occurrences.note: produced by S1_SIGNAL_ENGINE, consumed by S2_INTENT_BUILDER, U1_DASHBOARD_BACKEND, U2_GUI_GATEWAY

source_code_evidence.note: Signal_v1 referenced in trading signal channel

contract_inventory.recommendation: Adopt Signal@1.0 as schema_ref; UI-DATA-SIGNAL is a downstream projection.

manifest_occurrences.note: produced by B3_EXEC_EVENT_NORMALIZER, consumed by O2_OMS_STATE_MACHINE

source_code_evidence.note: ExecutionReport_v1 referenced in execution channel

contract_inventory.recommendation: Adopt ExecutionReport@1.0 as schema_ref.

manifest_occurrences.note: Not directly used; IndicatorSnapshot is the manifest-referenced projection

source_code_evidence.note: IndicatorSnapshot class in expiry_indicator_service; overlaps with IndicatorVector semantics

process_evidence.note: S09 emits IndicatorSnapshot; IndicatorVector is the wire-level payload

conflicts.description: Bundle/process step use 'IndicatorSnapshot'; canonical schema is 'IndicatorVector'

contract_inventory.recommendation: Rename or alias to reconcile. Recommend keeping IndicatorSnapshot as manifest contract_name with schema_ref pointing to IndicatorVector@1.1 until authoritative rename is chosen.

manifest_occurrences.note: produced by D3_CALENDAR_NORMALIZER; consumed by multiple modules

schema_evidence.note: CalendarEvent schema v1.0 with impact enum LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH

source_code_evidence.note: GUI CalendarEvent variant for dashboard rendering

conflicts.description: Some CSV/JSON payloads use MED; canonical schema uses MEDIUM
GUI gateway defines a separate CalendarEvent with different fields for dashboard consumption

contract_inventory.recommendation: Adopt CalendarEvent@1.0 as authoritative; treat GUI gateway model as an outward projection, not a rival contract.

process_evidence.note: Reentry decision is downstream of MatrixDecision, not the same shape

conflicts.description: event_models.ReentryDecision and csv_models.ReentryDecision have divergent fields (event: reentry_key/generation/should_reenter/matrix_outcome; csv: trade_id/hybrid_id/outcome_class/duration_class/reentry_action)

contract_inventory.recommendation: Split into two named contracts (e.g., ReentryDecisionEvent vs ReentryDecisionRow) or explicitly document that CSV is persistence layer of the event.

contract_inventory.recommendation: No authoritative fields exist; the manifest generator cannot populate schema_ref. Requires new JSON schema + Pydantic model authored under contracts/events and contracts/models before manifest can be completed.
